name: Double Coconut Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. FILLING
- In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
- Stir in milk and cream of coconut. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly.
- Continue cooking for 2 more minutes.
- Gradually stir in about 1 cup of the hot mixture into the beaten egg yolks, stirring continuously.
- Return all of the mixture to the saucepan and cook until bubbly. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
- Remove from heat and stir in butter until melted.
- Stir in coconut and vanilla.
2. MERINGUE
- Let egg whites stand at room temperature for 30 minutes.
- In a mixing bowl, beat egg whites, vanilla, and cream of tartar on medium speed of an electric mixer until soft peaks form (tips curl).
- Gradually add sugar, one tablespoon at a time, beating to stiff peaks.
- Evenly spread meringue over hot filling. Seal to pastry edge.
- Sprinkle with coconut.
3. BAKING
- Bake in a 350°F oven for 15 minutes.
- Cool on a wire rack for 1 hour.
- Cover and chill for 3 to 6 hours before serving.
